name: harness-starter-audio
author: octos
description: Starter for a harnessed audio custom app. Synthesizes a minimal WAV file under audio/ and lets the workspace contract deliver it.

tools.name: synthesize_clip
tools.description: Synthesize a short WAV clip for a label. Writes to audio/<slug>.wav. Replace with a real TTS/render engine when adapting the starter.

label.description: Label used to derive the filename.

duration_ms.description: Clip duration in ms; clamped to [100, 5000]. Default 500.
